title: Cloud Software Engineer (AWS / PaaS)
description:
We are seeking a Platform Software Engineer (PaaS) to design, build, and operate cloud platform services that enable application teams to deploy and run workloads efficiently, securely, and at scale. This role focuses on AWS-based platforms, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and automation to improve developer experience and platform reliability.

  • Working Hours: Mon-Fri
  • Working Location: North-East
  • Job Type: Contract

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, build, and maintain platform services and tooling that support application development and deployment on cloud environments.

  • Develop and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for cloud resources, ensuring consistency, security, and repeatability.

  • Build automation to support self-service provisioning, CI/CD integration, and standardised deployment patterns.

  • Operate and support platform services in production, including monitoring, troubleshooting, and incident resolution.

  • Collaborate with application, DevOps, and security teams to align platform capabilities with engineering and compliance requirements.

  • Implement and enforce platform standards, guardrails, and best practices for security, reliability, and cost efficiency.

  • Continuously improve platform observability, including logging, metrics, and alerting.

  • Contribute to platform documentation, runbooks, and operational guides.

Requirements

  • Degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • At least 1 year of experience in platform engineering, cloud engineering, or DevOps-related roles.

  • Strong hands-on experience with AWS (e.g. EC2, VPC, IAM, EKS/ECS, RDS, S3).

  • Proven experience with Infrastructure as Code (e.g. Terraform, CloudFormation, AWS CDK).

  • Proficiency in at least one programming language (e.g. Python, Go, Java, JavaScript, Bash).

  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment workflows.

  • Solid understanding of cloud networking, security, and identity management.

  • Strong troubleshooting skills and the ability to operate systems in production environments.

  • Good communication skills and a collaborative, engineering-first mindset.

Nice to Have

  • Experience building or operating PaaS or internal developer platforms (IDP).

  • Hands-on experience with container platforms (Docker, Kubernetes, EKS).

  • Exposure to observability tools (e.g. CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana).

  • Experience working in regulated or large-scale enterprise environments.

  • AWS certifications (e.g. Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer) are a plus.

Why Join Us

  • Work on core platform services used by multiple engineering teams.

  • Influence developer experience, cloud standards, and platform reliability.

  • Opportunity to work with modern cloud and automation technologies at scale.

By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:

  • Contact you about potential opportunities.
  • Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.

All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Elane Yap Theng Yu- R1989397

ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
